name: Overly Restrictive Account Lockout Mechanism
description: The product's account lockout mechanism is too easily triggered, allowing attackers to lock out legitimate users by deliberately making failed authentication attempts. While designed to prevent brute force attacks, an overly sensitive lockout can be weaponized as a denial-of-service attack against specific user accounts.
detection_pattern: AUTH node implementing account lockout uses a CONTROL node with overly aggressive thresholds that can be triggered by unauthenticated INGRESS requests. Look for lockout mechanisms that do not distinguish between legitimate owner attempts and attacker-driven failures, or lack progressive delays.
